name: Nectarine Raspberry Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and gelatin in a saucepan. Stir over medium heat until the gelatin dissolves.
2. Stir in wine and sugar until dissolved. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Puree raspberries, nectarines, lemon zest, and lemon juice in a blender.
4. Combine the puree with the wine syrup until blended.
5. Turn into a shallow pan and freeze until firm.
6. Soften slightly, then beat smooth in a mixer.
7. Refreeze and keep frozen until ready to use.
